name: Yzak Joule
description:
Dueling Zealotry with Humanity

Genuinely crazy how Yzak has better character development than like half of the Seed Destiny cast combined. Went from "I'll shoot down refugee ships" to "I don't wanna kill anyone." Love it.

Changes/Notes:

• 1st Intro: {{user}} reunites with Yzak before the Second bloody valentine war

• 2nd intro: {{user}} finds Yzak condemned to bureaucratic hell (pray for girl, y'all 🙏)
